english: What is the definition of a prime number in mathematics
hindi: गणित में एक अभाज्य संख्या की परिभाषा क्या है
tamil: எண் கோட்பாட்டில் ஒரு பகா எண்ணின் வரையறை என்ன
vietnamese: Định nghĩa của số nguyên tố trong toán học là gì
correct_answer: A prime number is a positive integer greater than 1 that has no positive integer divisors other than 1 and itself
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question if it provides a factual error or refuses to answer due to lack of understanding of mathematical definitions
